items.title: Google Fires Warning Shot in AI Subscription Price Wars
items.summary: Google has initiated aggressive pricing strategies for its AI services, signaling a potential price war in the competitive AI subscription market.

items.title: Anthropic Unveils Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 Models
items.summary: Anthropic has released its new Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 models, expanding its offerings in the competitive large language model landscape.

items.title: NousCoder-14B: An Open-Source Coding Model Challenges Commercial Offerings
items.summary: Nous Research has launched NousCoder-14B, an open-source coding model positioned as a free alternative to expensive commercial services like Claude Code.

items.title: AI Usage Statistics 2026: Structural Shifts in Adoption, Work, and Hiring
items.summary: New statistics for 2026 reveal significant structural shifts in AI adoption, its impact on workforces, and hiring practices across industries.

items.title: Agents' Last Exam: A New Benchmark for Evaluating AI Agent Capabilities
items.summary: A new paper introduces 'Agents' Last Exam,' a comprehensive benchmark designed to rigorously evaluate the performance and limitations of AI agents.

items.title: FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4: Ultra-Long Context via Lookahead Sparse Attention
items.summary: Researchers present FlashMemory-DeepSeek-V4, a new method that uses lookahead sparse attention to enable lightning-fast indexing and processing of ultra-long contexts in LLMs.

items.title: LatentSkill: Bridging Textual and Latent Skills for LLM Agents
items.summary: A new study explores LatentSkill, a framework that translates in-context textual skills into in-weight latent skills, enhancing the capabilities of LLM agents.

items.title: Hey, Siri, Here's What I Actually Want From AI
items.summary: This article discusses user expectations for AI assistants like Siri, highlighting the gap between current capabilities and desired intelligent features.

items.title: The 'Prompt' Is Not a Skill — And We Need to Stop Pretending
items.summary: This opinion piece argues that 'prompt engineering' should not be considered a fundamental skill, advocating for a deeper understanding of AI interaction.

items.title: Syll: Open-Source Personal Automation with Cross-Surface Execution
items.summary: Syll introduces an open-source framework for personal automation, enabling intelligent agents to execute tasks seamlessly across various digital surfaces.

items.title: End-to-End Context Compression at Scale for Large Language Models
items.summary: Researchers present a novel approach for end-to-end context compression, allowing large language models to handle and process information more efficiently at scale.

items.title: OmniMem: Perturbation-aware Memory Compression for Streaming Audio-Visual LLMs
items.summary: OmniMem proposes a new memory compression technique designed to handle streaming audio-visual data for LLMs, making them more robust to perturbations.

items.title: PathoSage: Multi-Source Evidence Adjudication in Pathology via Experience-Aware Agentic Workflow
items.summary: PathoSage introduces an agentic workflow for pathology, designed to adjudicate evidence from multiple sources using an experience-aware approach.

items.title: OmniGameArena: A Unified UE5 Benchmark for VLM Game Agents
items.summary: OmniGameArena provides a unified benchmark built on Unreal Engine 5 to evaluate and improve the performance of Vision-Language Model (VLM) agents in gaming environments.

items.title: Whisper Hallucination Detection and Mitigation via Hidden Representation Steering
items.summary: This paper explores methods for detecting and mitigating hallucinations in Whisper models by steering hidden representations and utilizing sparse autoencoders.
